tasks.description: Phase 4 testing gate — full regression across all phases + acceptance testing for all Phase 4 features (FEAT-045 through FEAT-052)
acceptance_criteria: Full regression: process canvas (create/edit/delete steps+sections+connections), journey canvas (stages+touchpoints), perspectives (create+annotate), gap analysis, comparison view, teams/people/tools CRUD, PDF/PNG export (static code analysis), public sharing

Comments acceptance: create comment with category, reply to comment (threading), resolve comment, filter by category on workspace comments page, comment count badges on canvas nodes, CommentCountsContext wired

Tasks acceptance: create task on step, toggle completion (strikethrough), reorder tasks (position field), task count badges on step nodes (TaskCountsContext), section-level task rollup in section detail panel

Runbooks acceptance: create runbook from section (step snapshot), 4-state step status transitions (pending→in_progress→completed, pending→skipped), progress bar (resolved=completed+skipped), Complete/Cancel via Radix Dialog, read-only mode for completed/cancelled, list page with filter tabs

Playbook acceptance: distraction-free fixed overlay (z-50), Mark Complete & Next advances to next pending step, Skip button, dot navigation, progress bar+text, mobile-responsive (max-w-xl), URL-shareable

Activity acceptance: logActivity() calls present in POST/PATCH/DELETE routes (spot-check 10+ routes), activity page renders entries with user email (not 'Unknown'), action type filter tabs, Load More pagination with skeleton placeholders, entity links navigate correctly

Clone acceptance: clone_workspace() RPC exists (migration 018), API route POST /workspaces/[id]/clone, Duplicate Workspace button in settings with Radix Dialog confirmation, deep copy covers 12+ child tables, new UUIDs throughout

Coloring acceptance: coloring_rules CRUD (API + panel UI), rules evaluated client-side in position order (last match wins), step nodes show 15% opacity tint, heat map takes precedence, has_role disabled in dropdown (BUG-020 fix), paintbrush button in canvas toolbar

Templates acceptance: templates CRUD (API + migration 020 table), Save as Template dialog on section panel, template browser dialog in canvas toolbar, STARTER_TEMPLATES constant (4 hardcoded), deploy route with UUID remap, role-by-name matching. Note: DB operations blocked until migration 020 pushed — test code paths and UI states, not end-to-end DB flow
Compilation: npx tsc --noEmit passes, npm run lint passes (1 pre-existing warning acceptable), no new TypeScript errors

patterns_to_follow: Static code analysis + API probing (Playwright unavailable per LEARNINGS.md)
Regression baseline from iteration 100 (29/32 checks — 3 FAIL were BUG-021 routing, now fixed in codebase)
learnings_relevant: Playwright MCP unavailable — use static analysis + curl for testing
workspace-shell route exclusion list — verify all segments present
Server/API query mismatch — check page.tsx and route.ts use same .select() shape
apiFetch unwraps envelope — verify client functions return apiFetch<T>() directly
Migration 020 not pushed — templates DB operations will fail, test code paths only

tasks.special_instructions: This is the Phase 4 testing gate — the largest and most comprehensive test suite to date. Test the FULL CHAIN: section with tasks → create runbook → execute in playbook → activity log captures all. For templates, test code structure and UI states only (migration 020 not pushed — DB calls will fail). BUG-021 (workspace-shell exclusion) is fixed in current codebase — verify fix is present. BUG-024 (section-detail-panel DialogTitle) is known P2 — log but don't fail on it. Open improvements (IMP-004, IMP-010, IMP-017, IMP-021-027, IMP-031, IMP-033-034, IMP-037-038) are not blockers — note any new findings but don't block gate on them.

testing_plan.regression_reason: FEAT-053 Phase 4 testing gate — comprehensive regression + acceptance across all Phase 4 features before phase completion

warnings_added: Accessibility cadence severely overdue (last audit iteration 21, now iteration 103 — 82 iterations). Schedule accessibility audit immediately after Phase 4 gate passes.
BUG-024 (section-detail-panel DialogTitle a11y) remains open P2 — same root cause as fixed BUG-023.
Migration 020 not pushed — templates feature untestable end-to-end. Human action required: npx supabase db push.
